zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Axtell於大約1470年出生在英國賀特福爾時，她的父親Thomas Axtell8歲，母親Joan Gould4歲。她於1500年與Henry Whitman結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1522年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Axtell于大约1470年出生在英国賀特福爾时，她的父亲Thomas Axtell8岁，母亲Joan Gould4岁。她于1500年与Henry Whitman结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1522年在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Axtell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Asketill, from Old Norse Ásketill, composed of the elements áss ‘god’ + ketill ‘sacrificial cauldron, helmet’ (see also Haskell ). This name was in use both among Scandinavian settlers in eastern England (esp. Norfolk) and among the Normans.

nickname for a salt merchant or seller of salt, from Middle English hakke-salt ‘chop salt (into pieces)’. The development of the surname to Axtel is evidenced in 16th-century Hertfordshire and Buckinghamshire.

variants.name: Axton
meanings: habitational name from Axton in Kent, named from the Old English personal name Acca + Old English stān ‘stone’.

(Buckinghamshire): possibly a variant of Axtell , or alternatively a habitational name from a metathesized form of a placename such as Ashton in Bainton, Northamptonshire, which is recorded as Axton in 1253.

variants.name: Antell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Antil, a shortened form of Anketil, a common Norman variant of Old Norse Ásketill (see Axtell ).
English: variant of   Antill  , a habitational name from Ampthill in Bedfordshire.

Swedish and Finnish (of Swedish origin): ornamental name from placenames in Finland and Sweden such as Ant(t)ila and Antby, or from the Finnish personal name Antti (a vernacular form of Andreas ), + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

variants.name: Estell
meanings: variant of Eskell, from the Middle English personal name Askell, Old Norse Áskell, a shortened form of Ásketill (see Axtell ). The personal name was also popular among the Normans, sometimes in the form Anskell (ancient Germanic Ans- substituted for As-), which largely explains why the name occurs in post-Conquest England in counties not settled by Vikings.

topographic name from Middle English est ‘east’ + hal(le) ‘chief building, hall’ or hale ‘nook, remote place’ (Old English ēast + hall or halh), denoting someone who lived or worked at the ‘east hall’ or who lived at a place known as the ‘east nook’.

variants.name: Haskell
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Askell with prosthetic H-, from Old Norse Áskell, a shortened form of Ásketill (see Axtell ). The personal name was also popular among the Normans, sometimes in the form Anskell (with ancient Germanic Ans- substituted for As-), which explains why the name occurs in post-Conquest England in counties not settled by Vikings. Its appearance as a surname is often disguised by altered pronunciations; metathesis of /sk/ to /ks/, spelled -x-, for example, has given rise to Axtell . The Normans frequently used the name in Frankish forms; see Askin , Haskin , Hasty , and Astin . For the name in the Isle of Man see Castell .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the personal name Khaskl, a Yiddish form of the Hebrew name Yeḥezqel (see Ezekiel ).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Axtell was born about 1470, in Hertfordshire, England, her father, Thomas Axtell, was 8 and her mother, Joan Gould, was 4. She married Henry Whitman in 1500. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1522, in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Axtell est née environ 1470, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Axtell, avait 8 ans et sa mère, Joan Gould, avait 4 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Whitman en 1500. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1522, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Axtell um 1470 in Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Axtell 8 und ihre Mutter Joan Gould 4. Sie hat 1500 Henry Whitman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1522 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Axtell è nata il circa 1470 nel Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Axtell, aveva 8 anni e sua madre, Joan Gould, aveva 4 anni. Lei sposato Henry Whitman nel 1500. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1522, nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Axtellが約1470年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Axtellは8歳，母Joan Gouldは4歳であった。1500年にHenry Whitmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1522年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Axtell(이)가 대략 1470년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Axtell(은)는 8세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Gould(은)는 4세였다. 그녀는 1500년 Henry Whitman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1522년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Axtell nasceu aproximadamente 1470, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Axtell, tinha 8 anos e sua mãe, Joan Gould, tinha 4 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Whitman em 1500. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1522, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Axtell родилась около 1470 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Axtell было 8 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Gould, 4. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Whitman в 1500 г. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1522 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Axtell nació aproximadamente 1470, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Axtell, tenía 8 años y su mamá, Joan Gould, tenía 4 años.
